content.full_text:
City of Cupertino

10300 Torre Avenue
Cupertino, CA 95014-3255
Telephone: (408) 252-4505
FAX: (408) 252-0753

DEPARTMENT OF THE CITY CLERK

October 21, 1992

Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, California 95814

REQUEST FOR ADVICE

A neighboring city furnished members of its police department with cards similar to the popular "baseball cards". These were used by police officers as a public relations item and were well received. Evidently, Council members like them and requested their own, which they also distribute. An example of one is enclosed.

One of Cupertino's councilmembers has requested that our city furnish these cards to City Council. There is concern on staff's part regarding use of public funds for something that could be used extensively during a campaign for re-election or election to another office. These could also be inserted into mass mailings by an elected official.

I would appreciate hearing from the FPPC regarding the legality and/or appropriateness of use of public funds for this type of material.

Sincerely,

[signature]
DOROTHY CORNELIUS, CMC
CITY CLERK

DC/cs
